_meta.description: 11 SBU 의 Wikidata Q-item 데이터. 각 항목을 개별 Q-item 으로 등록 후 Q-ID 매핑을 registered.json 에 반영

description.en: AI debate platform that generates arguments for both sides on any topic, with community voting

description.en: B2B SaaS comparison engine that uses AI to analyze hundreds of tools and surface the optimal stack

description.en: AI-powered product review magazine producing data-driven reviews from automated analysis
